title: paederia scandens
intro: Paederia scandens, also known as Indian coleus or climbing paederia, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Paederia scandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an anti-oxidant, making it beneficial for overall health and well-being. Paederia scandens can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
